title: Vulnerability Remediation Policy
body:
## Vulnerability Remediation Policy

This document outlines the standard remediation process for vulnerabilities discovered in our software dependencies.

### Assessment
All vulnerabilities rated Critical or High according to CVSS v3.1 must be addressed within 15 business days. Medium and Low vulnerabilities should be evaluated during regular sprint planning.

### Remediation Steps
1. Verify the affected dependency and its version in our codebase.
2. Identify a patched version or alternative library.
3. Test compatibility with our application in a staging environment.
4. Prepare a pull request with the dependency upgrade and any necessary code changes.
5. Deploy the fix following the standard release process.

### Tracking
Every high‑severity finding must have a corresponding ticket in the Ticketing system. The ticket must include:
- The CVE identifier(s)
- Affected component and recommended fix version
- Reproduction steps and test evidence
